char_threshold.description: Minimum text length (characters) to trigger rendering.

score_threshold.description: Minimum markdown score to trigger rendering. Higher values require more markdown syntax.

render_timeout.description: Maximum time (seconds) to wait for a single render.

footer.description: Footer text shown at bottom of rendered images. Leave empty to hide.

llm_only.description: Only render LLM responses. When enabled, command outputs (e.g. /help) are not rendered.

md_html.description: ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING: Allow raw HTML tags in markdown. When enabled, HTML embedded in markdown is rendered as-is, which may allow script injection from untrusted sources. Keep disabled unless all input is trusted.

md_linkify.description: Automatically convert plain-text URLs into clickable links.

md_quotes.description: Quote replacement characters used by the typographer (4-char string: open-double, close-double, open-single, close-single). Default keeps ASCII straight quotes.

katex_throw_on_error.description: Throw an exception on invalid LaTeX instead of rendering an error message inline.

katex_trust.description: ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING: Allow KaTeX commands that can generate arbitrary HTML (e.g. \href, \url). This may enable script injection from untrusted sources. Keep disabled unless all input is trusted.

hljs_ignore_illegals.description: Continue highlighting even when the code contains syntax errors for the declared language.
